TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy_Ralph_Beard, title = Ralph_Beard, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Sakizaya]}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/wiki/Ralph_Beard} }

S.FORM: == Ralph Beard == u siwkay niza u Amilika a tademaw, tatama. u kawaw niza u mimaliay. 12 bulad 2 demiad, 1927 a mihca, Ralph Beard, miunduay. (mapatay i 2007 a mihca)
S.PHON: == *ar~ɾpħ bəard == u siwkaj niza u amir~ɾika a tadəmaw, tatama. u kawaw niza u mimar~ɾiaj. ** bur~ɾad * dəmiad, **** a miħʦa, *ar~ɾpħ bəard, miunduaj. (mapataj i **** a miħʦa)
S.FORM: == Ralph Beard == u siwkay niza u Amilika a tademaw, tatama. u kawaw niza u mimaliay. 12 bulad 2 demiad, 1927 a mihca, Ralph Beard, miunduay. (mapatay i 2007 a mihca)
S.PHON: == *ar~ɾpħ bəard == u siwkaj niza u amir~ɾika a tadəmaw, tatama. u kawaw niza u mimar~ɾiaj. ** bur~ɾad * dəmiad, **** a miħʦa, *ar~ɾpħ bəard, miunduaj. (mapataj i **** a miħʦa)
